name: Global Star Acquisition Inc. Unit
summary: Global Star Acquisition Inc. Unit consists of one share of common stock and one-half of a warrant and right to acquire more common stock. It is a blank check company (SPAC) formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company focuses on opportunities to acquire businesses and is headquartered in New York.
